claim.statement: Both the chaos 0-1-test no-separation barrier (R4 empirical) and W(3,3) <= 27 (R2 formal) hold -- a composite that carries a CERTIFIED empirical R4 barrier through the min-trust calculus as a first-class input.
claim.negation_of: a counterexample to either the chaos 0-1-test no-go or W(3,3) <= 27

rung.name: empirical-robust
trusted_base: min-trust = max(R4 empirical, R2 formal, step R0) = R4
the composite is exactly as strong as its weakest certified part: the empirical R4 barrier (named human sign-off + stress contract) caps it

meta.demonstrates: a CERTIFIED claim-stress R4 barrier is a first-class min-trust input; the formal R2 part cannot launder the composite above the empirical R4 link

step.description: conjunction of a CERTIFIED R4 empirical barrier and a CERTIFIED R2 formal barrier

provenance.pipeline: recursively re-checks both sub-barriers (the R4 re-runs its full claim-stress contract incl. the named sign-off); declared rung must equal the weakest = R4

one_directional: CERTIFIED only if BOTH parts re-certify AND the declared rung equals the weakest (R4). If the chaos R4 sign-off were withdrawn, that sub becomes DEFERRED and the whole composite propagates DEFERRED -- a formal R2 part can never launder an empirical bundle up to R2.
